I now end all patterns of fear in my family tree. I take authority over all fear of rejection and feelings of failure. I say ”NO” to all fears of water, men, height, success, failure, crowds, women, God, death, leaving home, closed places, open spaces, speaking out, flying, and pain.

Lord, let my family know in all generations that there is no fear in love. Let your perfect love so fill my family history that all memories of fear are gone.

I praise you, I bless You, Lord.
